About FixICE.org

FixICE.org is a Burlington, MA-based grassroots organization and active member of the coalition of groups that protest at the ICE detention center in Burlington Mon-Sat. FixICE.org organizes the Monday and Tuesday protest groups.

Our mission is to empower people to take effective action to stop ICE cruelties, defend immigrant rights, and win elections that create lasting change - covering causes from ICE Abuses and Immigration to Elections.

Weekly Events

  • Monday & Tuesday - Protest at the ICE detention center, 1000 District Ave, Burlington, MA.
  • Wednesday - ☕ Coffee Connection - Caffeinate, connect, and contribute. Enjoy coffee and community at the protest site, with a featured fundraiser and actions to take. Details & donate.

We Make It Easier to Get Involved

Getting involved can feel overwhelming - we make it easier. Our website curates the best organizations and resources so you can quickly find meaningful ways to act. Browse by Strategy:

  • ✊ Protest - show up and be counted
  • 🙋 Volunteer - give your time to frontline organizations
  • 📢 Advocate - contact officials and spread the word
  • 📖 Learn - understand the issues and build your knowledge
  • 💸 Donate - fund the groups doing the work

Or filter by Cause: ICE Abuses, Immigration, Elections, or see what's Featured.

We highlight established local groups that:

  • Meet regularly
  • Make participation accessible
  • Provide clear information
  • Have a track record of effective action
Note: This site will be updated regularly with new resources and information. You don't have to keep checking every page-just visit Latest Updates for a log of all recent changes and additions.
